items.title: Software Stocks Have Taken a Beating This Year. Here’s What’s Ahead.
items.description: Many are now offering a range of AI products in hopes of boosting productivity and reshaping how enterprises operate.  Salesforce’s  third-quarter revenue just missed expectations, but earnings were above consensus and guidance was strong.  Creative software company  Adobe  also had a solid third-quarter and provided better-than-expected financial guidance for the year ahead.

items.title: 3 Insider Moves You Shouldn’t Ignore Heading Into 2026
items.description: Salesforce saw $25M in insider buys, Symbotic had $186M in insider sales, and Blue Owl insiders bought $5.9M—all in December 2025.

items.title: Adobe Vs. Salesforce: In The Age Of Agentic AI
items.description: See why Salesforce, Inc. shows stronger resilience to AI disruption than Adobe Inc. Compare growth, margins, and AI integration. Click for more on ADBE and CRM.

items.title: Can Five9's Strong Partner Ecosystem Drive the Next Growth Phase?
items.description: FIVN is betting on a deep partner ecosystem, embedding its cloud contact center into enterprise workflows to drive larger deployments and steadier growth.

items.title: Panaya Recognized as a Strong Performer in Autonomous Testing Platforms, Q4 2025 Analyst Evaluation
items.description: Panaya, the leading agentic Testing and Change Impact Analysis platform for enterprise applications, today announced it has been named a Strong Performer in The Forrester Wave: Autonomous Testing Platforms, Q4 2025 by Forrester Research.
